title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Bank brings to those classes of customers who believe Royal is the way of living, a Savings Account which provides not just facilities and free services but a comfortable way of banking. The definition of Banking is extended beyond the realm of the regularity it depicts. Some exclusive features are as: 
Access to any Bank ATM domestic as well International is free of charges.
Access to free RTGS and NEFT services through branch as well as Net- Banking.
Enroll a Family Member into our Preferred Banking Gamut by opening a Power Plus account given as complimentary by the Bank.
Can be used in India and abroad to make purchases at Merchant locations and withdraw local currency at ATMs. 
Surcharge will be waived only for Platinum Card transactions with a value between Rs. 400 and Rs. 5,000. 
Customers can withdraw cash up to Rs. 1,50,000 and make purchases worth Rs. 3,00,000 in a day. 
Can be used online, for shopping, booking air / rail / movie tickets & utility bill payments. 
2 points earned for every Rs. 100 spent. Redeem each point for cash credit of Rs. 1 to the account for every point. 
Dedicated Relationship Manager for Investment advisory, Portfolio management and personalized services. 
Rs. 3 lakhs Average Monthly balance in savings account or Rs. 15 lakhs Fixed Deposit 
Rs. 5 lakhs Average Monthly balance in savings account or Rs. 25 lakhs Fixed Deposit 


  * Doorstep banking: Free 2 cash pick up and 2 cash delivery per month
  * Anywhere banking: Complimentary any where banking service free for those upgrading to Royale Plus


  * Free Locker (Size: 5 x 6 x 19) or 50% discount in other locker rentals 
  * Tie ups with brands to offer discounts by making purchases through the Cards at these merchant locations


Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI Bank offers a wide range of products from savings and current bank account to loans for retail and msme customers  or agri loans to farmers. Apply Now.
metadata.keywords: Internet Banking, savings account, Debit Card, personal loans, home loans, loans, fixed deposits
